rejected_hypotheses: H-main: Very Long Context + Per-Request Overhead Mechanism
H-ablation-long-context: Very Long Context Term Importance
H-ablation-kv-mgmt: KV Management Term Importance (iter1 ablation was spurious)
inconclusive_hypotheses: H-boundary-long-context-threshold: Very Long Context Activation Threshold
critical_findings: Scout MoE failures (6/6 experiments, 89-100% TTFT) traced to THREE simulator bugs: interleaved MoE architecture ignored, intermediate_size_mlp field not parsed, nEff applied to all layers
β₆ inflation to 0.224 (28× expected) was diagnostic signal of structural architecture mismatch, not physics parameter
All reasoning experiments (3/3) have catastrophic errors (~100% TTFT) - still unexplained, likely data quality
β₇ (very long context) is active but completely ineffective
β₈ (per-request overhead) failed to normalize β₁ (still inflated at 1.027)
root_cause: CRITICAL DISCOVERY: Scout failures (6/15 experiments, 89-100% TTFT error) are SIMULATOR BUGS, not data quality. Three bugs found: (1) Interleaved MoE architecture ignored (24 MoE + 24 dense layers treated as 48 MoE layers), (2) intermediate_size_mlp field not parsed (dense layers use wrong 8192 FFN dim instead of 16384), (3) nEff expert loading applied to all layers. β₆ inflation to 0.224 (28× expected) was diagnostic signal of structural mismatch. Reasoning failures (3/15 experiments) remain unexplained, likely data quality.
recommendation: MANDATORY: Fix Scout MoE bugs BEFORE iter3 hypothesis design. Expected improvement: Scout TTFT 89-100% → <30%, overall loss 150.78% → ~80-100%. After Scout fixes validated, proceed to iter3 with Scout INCLUDED in training set. Audit reasoning experiments separately (re-measure with --no-prefix-cache or exclude). Fix Alpha coefficients to constants, remove β₇/β₈, fix or remove β₂/β₄.
cv_decision: SKIP - loss = 150.78% (threshold: <80%), all hypotheses rejected, coefficients unphysical
next_steps: MANDATORY Phase 0: Fix Scout MoE bugs in simulator code (4-6 hour task)
Validation: Re-run Scout experiments through fixed simulator (expect 89-100% → <30% TTFT error)
Reasoning audit: Re-measure with --no-prefix-cache OR exclude from iter3 training
Agent 1: After Scout fixes validated, design iter3 with 5-7 free parameters (fix Alpha, remove β₇/β₈, fix or remove β₂/β₄), Scout INCLUDED in training set
Agent 2: Run iter3 optimization with reduced model, regularization, and 12-15 clean experiments
